title: Payment Dispute — Incomplete Work
content: Per our agreement dated [DATE], payment is contingent upon completion of all items in the agreed scope. As documented in our inspection of [DATE], the following items remain incomplete: [ITEMS]. We are withholding $[AMOUNT] until satisfactory completion.

title: AOB Notice Template
content: This letter serves as formal notice that assignment of benefits under policy [POLICY_NUMBER] has been executed. All proceeds payable under this policy for claim [CLAIM_NUMBER] are hereby assigned to [ASSIGNEE]. Please direct all communications regarding this claim to the undersigned.

title: Scope Change Dispute
content: We dispute the additional charges of $[AMOUNT] for items described as [DESCRIPTION]. These items fall outside the agreed scope per our contract dated [DATE]. Section [SECTION] of the agreement clearly states [CLAUSE]. We request an itemized breakdown and justification for each additional charge.

title: Conditional Lien Waiver Request
content: Prior to processing payment of $[AMOUNT] for [PROJECT], we require a conditional lien waiver from [CONTRACTOR]. This is standard practice per Georgia Code § 44-14-366. Please provide the executed waiver within 5 business days.
